metadata.description: Micron Q3 2024 GAAP Gross Margin Beat

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

metadata.source_task_name: Micron Q3 2024 GAAP Gross Margin Beat

instruction:
How many basis points did Micron Technology (MU) beat or miss Q3 2024 GAAP gross margin guidance?

---
When you have completed the research and are ready to give the final answer, open http://127.0.0.1:7878/submit in the browser and submit your final answer there. Submit only after you are satisfied that the answer fulfills the task.

judge_context.rubric:
Evaluate whether the agent found the correct answer.

The correct answer is that Micron Technology (MU) beat Q3 2024 GAAP gross margin guidance by 140 basis points.
Key facts the response should contain:
- Company: Micron Technology (MU)
- Period: Q3 2024 (fiscal quarter)
- Metric: GAAP gross margin vs. guidance
- Direction: beat (outperformed)
- Amount: 140 basis points (bps)

Scoring guidance:
- 0.90-1.00: Correctly states 140 bps beat with direction and context (GAAP, Q3 2024)
- 0.70-0.89: Correct value and direction with minor context gaps
- 0.40-0.69: Partially correct (wrong bps or missing beat/miss direction)
- 0.00-0.39: Wrong answer or no meaningful response
judge_context.reference_solution: Micron Technology (MU) beat Q3 2024 GAAP gross margin guidance by 140 basis points.
judge_context.source_task_yaml:
task_id: T061_finance_mu_gm_beat
task_name: Micron Q3 2024 GAAP Gross Margin Beat
version: "1.0"
category: finance
difficulty: easy
tags: [general]

services:
  - name: web_real
    command: python mock_services/web_real/server.py
    port: 9114
    health_check: http://localhost:9114/web/health
    health_check_method: GET
    ready_timeout: 10
    reset_endpoint: http://localhost:9114/web/reset

prompt:
  text: |
    How many basis points did Micron Technology (MU) beat or miss Q3 2024 GAAP gross margin guidance?
  language: en

tools:
  - name: web_search
    description: Search the public web and return result snippets.
    input_schema:
      type: object
      properties:
        query:
          type: string
          description: Search query
        max_results:
          type: integer
          description: Maximum number of results
          default: 10
      required: [query]

  - name: web_fetch
    description: Fetch full webpage content for a URL.
    input_schema:
      type: object
      properties:
        url:
          type: string
          description: Target URL
        timeout_seconds:
          type: integer
          description: Request timeout in seconds
          default: 30
      required: [url]

tool_endpoints:
  - tool_name: web_search
    url: http://localhost:9114/web/search
    method: POST
  - tool_name: web_fetch
    url: http://localhost:9114/web/fetch
    method: POST


environment:
  timeout_seconds: 1800
  max_turns: 50

scoring_components:
  - name: bps_value
    weight: 0.40
    check:
      type: keywords_present
      keywords: ["140 bps", "140 basis points"]
  - name: beat_direction
    weight: 0.30
    check:
      type: keywords_present
      keywords: [beat]
  - name: context
    weight: 0.30
    check:
      type: keywords_present
      keywords: [Micron, Q3 2024, GAAP, gross margin]

safety_checks: []
expected_actions: []

judge_rubric: |
  Evaluate whether the agent found the correct answer.

  The correct answer is that Micron Technology (MU) beat Q3 2024 GAAP gross margin guidance by 140 basis points.
  Key facts the response should contain:
  - Company: Micron Technology (MU)
  - Period: Q3 2024 (fiscal quarter)
  - Metric: GAAP gross margin vs. guidance
  - Direction: beat (outperformed)
  - Amount: 140 basis points (bps)

  Scoring guidance:
  - 0.90-1.00: Correctly states 140 bps beat with direction and context (GAAP, Q3 2024)
  - 0.70-0.89: Correct value and direction with minor context gaps
  - 0.40-0.69: Partially correct (wrong bps or missing beat/miss direction)
  - 0.00-0.39: Wrong answer or no meaningful response

reference_solution: |
  Micron Technology (MU) beat Q3 2024 GAAP gross margin guidance by 140 basis points.

primary_dimensions: [completion, communication]
